goal: 实现 Agent Capsule 人类和 agent 友好的加密分享页

summary.title: 实现加密 Capsule 分享预览页
summary.what: 为 Capsule 链接分享增加加密浏览器预览、agent 导入命令元数据和可读 Worker 分享页；同时补充预览抽取与 Worker 页面测试。
summary.why: 用户希望人类打开链接能像分享页一样读到 session 预览，agent 拿到同一个链接也能知道如何安装 capsule 并导入完整 session 到自己的 Codex 原生 UI。
summary.user_goal: 实现 Agent Capsule 人类和 agent 友好的加密分享页

decisions.chose: 上传时生成 preview 字段，使用与 bundle 相同的 URL fragment key 和独立 nonce 加密 transcript。
decisions.rationale: 保留服务端只保存密文的现有安全模型，同时避免浏览器预览下载完整 capsule 消耗下载次数。

decisions.chose: 只抽取 user/assistant 正文和工具摘要，工具输出仅记录字节数。
decisions.rationale: 让人类页面可读，并降低暴露内部指令、完整命令输出或敏感运行细节的风险。

decisions.chose: manifest import 元数据同时提供 install、dry-run、execute 命令，并把 <this-url> 包在引号里。
decisions.rationale: 带 #k 的 URL 需要 shell 引号，否则 fragment 会被当作注释丢失。

decisions.chose: 保持单文件零依赖 Worker HTML/CSS/JS。
decisions.rationale: 当前 Worker 没有前端构建链，内联页面能以最小部署复杂度满足分享页需求。

rejected.alternative: 浏览器直接下载并解密完整 capsule 作为预览来源
rejected.reason: 会消耗完整 bundle 下载次数，首屏更慢，也扩大浏览器端处理面。

rejected.alternative: Worker 明文保存 transcript 预览
rejected.reason: 会破坏服务端只持有密文的链接分享安全模型。

review_notes: 验证通过：go test ./internal/capsule ./internal/codex、go test ./...、npm --prefix deploy/cloudflare-worker test、npm --prefix deploy/cloudflare-worker run check、git diff --check。
使用本地 Worker wrapper 和系统 Chrome 验证桌面 1440px 与移动 390px：预览可解密、无横向溢出、execute 命令包含带引号的完整 #k URL。
旧分享链接仍可用；没有 preview 字段时页面显示 legacy 状态并保留 agent 导入命令。

architectural_claims: Link preview is generated client-side from encrypted manifest metadata and decrypted in the browser with the URL fragment key.
Worker share page remains a zero-dependency single-file implementation.
behavioral_changes: capsule share link manifests include agent import metadata and an optional encrypted preview payload.
Opening /s/:id now renders a human-readable preview shell instead of only a bare command.
Accept: application/json on /s/:id returns normalized agent import metadata, including defaults for legacy manifests.
Preview transcript includes user/assistant messages and collapsed tool summaries without full tool output.

api_changes.signature: GET /s/:id HTML and Accept: application/json responses

data_model_changes.name: LinkManifest.preview
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing manifests without preview are rendered as legacy links.

data_model_changes.name: PreviewTranscript
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Preview is optional and derived during share creation.

security_implications: Preview payload is encrypted with AES-256-GCM and a separate nonce; the key remains in the URL fragment.
Worker and R2 continue to store ciphertext only for both full bundle and preview payload.
Rendered transcript uses DOM textContent rather than injecting raw transcript HTML.
migration_notes: No storage migration required; old links lack preview but still expose import instructions.
